title: Budget Birthday
short_description: Grandma gave you a party budget and a shopping list — buy exactly what's needed and spend it all without going a single coin over.
description: You're planning the coolest party ever, but Grandma gave you an exact budget and a shopping list — buy everything on the list without going a single coin over! It's real financial-literacy budgeting: add up prices, hit a target total, and learn to plan spending. Grade bands ramp from whole-dollar coins and small budgets, to bigger sums with more choices, to dollars-and-cents prices on a tight budget. A free online money and budgeting game for kids in grades 1–5, with streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap items to add them to your cart, then Check out.
